title: • Archetype Transformation → Gains Power, Loses XP
content:
• Archetype Transformation → Gains Power, Loses XP
• Symbol Change → Gains a New Passive Effect, Suffers a Status Effect
• Alignment Shift → Gains Special Abilities, Becomes Vulnerable to Certain Actions

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ensures that major transformations remain rare and meaningful.
✔ Adds a dramatic in-class moment with player-versus-player stakes.
✔ Forces students to weigh risk and reward before attempting a transformation.

📜 2. Unique Archetypes – Permanent, Unless Purged with Heavy Cost

📜 Once a player claims a unique archetype, it remains with them—unless they take extreme measures.

✔ How Unique Archetypes Work:
• Once chosen, they cannot be passed to another player.
• A student can purge themselves of their archetype only through a rare in-game event.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 523 (chunk 523/555)
